raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Sensationalism and Emotionalism","biasedText":"An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us","explanation":"The headline uses emotive, sweeping language (“from the heart of Iran,” “Don’t give up on us”) to frame a single, anonymous account as broadly representative and urgent, priming readers emotionally."},{"biasType":"Bias by Omission","biasedText":"Omid spoke to the Post from Tehran via friends in California. Efforts have been made to protect his identity.","explanation":"The article presents only one anonymous voice and offers no corroboration, countervailing perspectives, or factual context to the letter’s many contested claims, leaving readers without alternative viewpoints."},{"biasType":"Slant","biasedText":"People at a nighttime street protest hold up signs that say “TRUMP” and “HELP”.","explanation":"The chosen image and caption foreground pro-Trump messaging that aligns with the letter’s narrative, while no images or captions reflect alternative sentiments, tilting the overall framing."}]}

detections.biasedText: An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us
detections.explanation: The headline uses emotive, sweeping language (“from the heart of Iran,” “Don’t give up on us”) to frame a single, anonymous account as broadly representative and urgent, priming readers emotionally.

detections.biasedText: Omid spoke to the Post from Tehran via friends in California. Efforts have been made to protect his identity.
detections.explanation: The article presents only one anonymous voice and offers no corroboration, countervailing perspectives, or factual context to the letter’s many contested claims, leaving readers without alternative viewpoints.

detections.biasedText: People at a nighttime street protest hold up signs that say “TRUMP” and “HELP”.
detections.explanation: The chosen image and caption foreground pro-Trump messaging that aligns with the letter’s narrative, while no images or captions reflect alternative sentiments, tilting the overall framing.
